description: Manage Zencoder/Zenflow projects, tasks, plans, workflows, and automations. Delegate complex coding problems to Zenflow's AI agents and track their progress.

auth.instructions: Get your Zencoder API key from the Zencoder dashboard (Settings > API Keys), then paste it here.

required_secrets.name: zencoder_api_key
required_secrets.prompt: Zencoder API Key (get one from app.zencoder.ai/settings)
